caption: A woman wearing a striped shirt and large black over-the-ear headphones is centered in a medium shot. She is positioned in a room with a light-colored wall and light yellow curtains with a blue border to her left. A neutral-toned ledge or surface is visible behind her. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, she is speaking, with her mouth open and eyes focused forward. In one instance, she briefly closes her eyes while continuing to speak. Her expression remains neutral to focused as she communicates. The background and her attire remain constant across the scenes, with only the slight movements of her facial expressions and lips changing as she speaks.
